full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Freezing

2 vials of 0.8 E6 cells each were frozen. The cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.51
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.08
 | viability [%] | 71.5
 | size [µm] | 7.9
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.78
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.756
 | viability [%] | 42.4
 | size [µm] | 7.3
Average | [cells/ml] | 1.645 E6
 | total [cells] | 1.645 E6 in 1 ml
 | viability [%] | 56.95
